name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Codex Companion adds telemetry, a control center, and privacy-safe, recoverable handoffs to new tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Task Cockpit, telemetry, control center, and handoffs
interface.longDescription: Extends Codex with a current-task Task Cockpit, session-isolated telemetry, advisory budgets, project insights, Safe Handoff Builder, native history focus, privacy-safe diagnostics, and rollback-safe launcher attach handling.
